title: Smooth Particles Reborn
description: Adds the functionality to spawn particles when you place a block (reborn)
body:
This mod adds the functionality to spawn particles when you place a block, allowing a much smoother experience

**Requires Fabric API and MidnightLib**

This mod works on the client side, which means you can play all your favorite servers with it

This mod is an updating fork of [Smooth Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-particles), check it out
